+

+# ============================================================

+# Vision Transformer for Weather Forecasting

+# ============================================================

+

+class PatchEmbed(nn.Module):

+    """Patch embedding with periodic padding for longitude."""

+    def __init__(self, in_channels, embed_dim, patch_size_h=4, patch_size_w=4):

+        super().__init__()

+        self.patch_size_h = patch_size_h

+        self.patch_size_w = patch_size_w

+        self.proj = nn.Conv2d(in_channels, embed_dim, 

+                              kernel_size=(patch_size_h, patch_size_w),

+                              stride=(patch_size_h, patch_size_w))

+

+    def forward(self, x):

+        # x: [B, C, H, W]

+        x = self.proj(x)  # [B, embed_dim, H//ph, W//pw]

+        B, C, H, W = x.shape

+        x = x.flatten(2).transpose(1, 2)  # [B, H*W, C]

+        return x, H, W

+

+

+class WeatherAttention(nn.Module):

+    """Multi-head self-attention with optional relative position bias."""

+    def __init__(self, dim, num_heads=8, dropout=0.0):

+        super().__init__()

+        self.num_heads = num_heads

+        self.head_dim = dim // num_heads

+        self.scale = self.head_dim ** -0.5

+        self.qkv = nn.Linear(dim, dim * 3)

+        self.proj = nn.Linear(dim, dim)

+        self.attn_drop = nn.Dropout(dropout)

+        self.proj_drop = nn.Dropout(dropout)

+

+    def forward(self, x):

+        B, N, C = x.shape

+        qkv = self.qkv(x).reshape(B, N, 3, self.num_heads, self.head_dim).permute(2, 0, 3, 1, 4)

+        q, k, v = qkv.unbind(0)

+        attn = (q @ k.transpose(-2, -1)) * self.scale

+        attn = attn.softmax(dim=-1)

+        attn = self.attn_drop(attn)

+        x = (attn @ v).transpose(1, 2).reshape(B, N, C)

+        x = self.proj_drop(self.proj(x))

+        return x

+

+

+class TransformerBlock(nn.Module):

+    def __init__(self, dim, num_heads=8, mlp_ratio=4.0, dropout=0.0, drop_path=0.0):

+        super().__init__()

+        self.norm1 = nn.LayerNorm(dim)

+        self.attn = WeatherAttention(dim, num_heads, dropout)

+        self.norm2 = nn.LayerNorm(dim)

+        mlp_dim = int(dim * mlp_ratio)

+        self.mlp = nn.Sequential(

+            nn.Linear(dim, mlp_dim),

+            nn.GELU(),

+            nn.Dropout(dropout),

+            nn.Linear(mlp_dim, dim),

+            nn.Dropout(dropout),

+        )

+        self.drop_path_rate = drop_path

+

+    def drop_path(self, x, training):

+        if not training or self.drop_path_rate == 0.0:

+            return x

+        keep_prob = 1 - self.drop_path_rate

+        shape = (x.shape[0],) + (1,) * (x.ndim - 1)

+        random_tensor = torch.rand(shape, dtype=x.dtype, device=x.device)

+        random_tensor = torch.floor(random_tensor + keep_prob)

+        return x / keep_prob * random_tensor

+

+    def forward(self, x):

+        x = x + self.drop_path(self.attn(self.norm1(x)), self.training)

+        x = x + self.drop_path(self.mlp(self.norm2(x)), self.training)

+        return x

+

+

+class WeatherViT(nn.Module):

+    """

+    Vision Transformer for weather forecasting.

+    Input: [B, T, C, H, W] -> [B, T*C, H, W]

+    Output: [B, out_channels, H, W]

+    """

+    def __init__(self, in_channels=6, out_channels=2, 

+                 img_size=(32, 64), patch_size=(4, 4),

+                 embed_dim=256, depth=8, num_heads=8,

+                 mlp_ratio=4.0, dropout=0.1, drop_path=0.1):

+        super().__init__()

+        self.img_size = img_size

+        self.patch_size = patch_size

+        self.embed_dim = embed_dim

+        

+        H, W = img_size

+        ph, pw = patch_size

+        self.num_patches_h = H // ph

+        self.num_patches_w = W // pw

+        self.num_patches = self.num_patches_h * self.num_patches_w

+        

+        # Patch embedding

+        self.patch_embed = PatchEmbed(in_channels, embed_dim, ph, pw)

+        

+        # Positional embedding (learnable)

+        self.pos_embed = nn.Parameter(torch.zeros(1, self.num_patches, embed_dim))

+        nn.init.trunc_normal_(self.pos_embed, std=0.02)

+        

+        # Transformer blocks

+        dpr = [x.item() for x in torch.linspace(0, drop_path, depth)]

+        self.blocks = nn.ModuleList([

+            TransformerBlock(embed_dim, num_heads, mlp_ratio, dropout, dpr[i])

+            for i in range(depth)

+        ])

+        self.norm = nn.LayerNorm(embed_dim)

+        

+        # Decoder: reshape patches back to image

+        self.decoder = nn.Sequential(

+            nn.Linear(embed_dim, ph * pw * out_channels * 4),

+            nn.GELU(),

+            nn.Linear(ph * pw * out_channels * 4, ph * pw * out_channels),

+        )

+        self.out_channels = out_channels

+        self.ph = ph

+        self.pw = pw

+

+    def forward(self, x):

+        B, T, C, H, W = x.shape

+        x = x.view(B, T * C, H, W)

+        

+        # Patch embedding

+        x, nh, nw = self.patch_embed(x)  # [B, N, embed_dim]

+        x = x + self.pos_embed

+        

+        # Transformer

+        for block in self.blocks:

+            x = block(x)

+        x = self.norm(x)  # [B, N, embed_dim]

+        

+        # Decode

+        x = self.decoder(x)  # [B, N, ph*pw*out_channels]

+        

+        # Reshape to image

+        B, N, _ = x.shape

+        x = x.reshape(B, nh, nw, self.ph, self.pw, self.out_channels)

+        x = x.permute(0, 5, 1, 3, 2, 4)  # [B, out_channels, nh, ph, nw, pw]

+        x = x.reshape(B, self.out_channels, nh * self.ph, nw * self.pw)

+        

+        return x

+

+

+# ============================================================

+# Hybrid CNN-Transformer (best of both worlds)

+# ============================================================

+

+class HybridWeatherModel(nn.Module):

+    """

+    CNN encoder + Transformer bottleneck + CNN decoder

+    """

+    def __init__(self, in_channels=6, out_channels=2, base_ch=64, 

+                 embed_dim=256, depth=4, num_heads=8, dropout=0.1):

+        super().__init__()

+        

+        # CNN Encoder

+        self.enc1 = ConvBlock(in_channels, base_ch, dropout=0.0)

+        self.enc2 = Down(base_ch, base_ch * 2, dropout=dropout)

+        self.enc3 = Down(base_ch * 2, base_ch * 4, dropout=dropout)

+        

+        # Project to transformer dim

+        self.to_transformer = nn.Conv2d(base_ch * 4, embed_dim, kernel_size=1)

+        

+        # Transformer blocks (on 4x8 feature map = 32 tokens)

+        self.transformer_blocks = nn.ModuleList([

+            TransformerBlock(embed_dim, num_heads, mlp_ratio=4.0, dropout=dropout)

+            for _ in range(depth)

+        ])

+        self.transformer_norm = nn.LayerNorm(embed_dim)

+        

+        # Project back

+        self.from_transformer = nn.Conv2d(embed_dim, base_ch * 4, kernel_size=1)

+        

+        # CNN Decoder

+        self.dec1 = Up(base_ch * 4, base_ch * 2, base_ch * 2, dropout=dropout)

+        self.dec2 = Up(base_ch * 2, base_ch, base_ch, dropout=dropout)

+        self.outc = nn.Conv2d(base_ch, out_channels, kernel_size=1)

+

+    def forward(self, x):

+        B, T, C, H, W = x.shape

+        x = x.view(B, T * C, H, W)

+        

+        # Encode

+        e1 = self.enc1(x)          # [B, base_ch, 32, 64]

+        e2 = self.enc2(e1)         # [B, base_ch*2, 16, 32]

+        e3 = self.enc3(e2)         # [B, base_ch*4, 8, 16]

+        

+        # To transformer

+        t = self.to_transformer(e3)  # [B, embed_dim, 8, 16]

+        B2, C2, H2, W2 = t.shape

+        t = t.flatten(2).transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 128, embed_dim]

+        

+        # Transformer

+        for block in self.transformer_blocks:

+            t = block(t)

+        t = self.transformer_norm(t)

+        

+        # Back to conv

+        t = t.transpose(1, 2).reshape(B2, C2, H2, W2)

+        t = self.from_transformer(t)  # [B, base_ch*4, 8, 16]

+        

+        # Decode

+        x = self.dec1(t, e2)       # [B, base_ch*2, 16, 32]

+        x = self.dec2(x, e1)       # [B, base_ch, 32, 64]

+        x = self.outc(x)           # [B, out_channels, 32, 64]

+        

+        return x
